python3 -c "
import socket, threading, time

def server():
    s = socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_STREAM)
    s.setsockopt(socket.SOL_SOCKET, socket.SO_REUSEADDR, 1)
    s.bind(('0.0.0.0', 29501))
    s.listen(1)
    conn, addr = s.accept()
    data = conn.recv(1024)
    conn.sendall(b'OK')
    conn.close()
    s.close()
    print(f'Server got: {data} from {addr}')

t = threading.Thread(target=server, daemon=True)
t.start()
time.sleep(1)
print('Server started on 29501')
" &

python3 -c "
import os, glob, time

# Check crush.db
db_paths = glob.glob(os.path.expanduser('~/.local/share/crush/*/crush.db'))
print('=== crush.db 检查 ===')
if db_paths:
    for p in db_paths:
        sz = os.path.getsize(p)
        age_h = (time.time() - os.path.getmtime(p)) / 3600
        print(f'  {p}: {sz} bytes, {age_h:.1f}h ago')
else:
    print('  未找到 crush.db')

# Check backups
backup_dir = os.path.expanduser('~/.crush_backups')
print(f'\n=== 热备检查 ({backup_dir}) ===')
if os.path.exists(backup_dir):
    backups = sorted(glob.glob(os.path.join(backup_dir, '*.db*')))
    if backups:
        latest = backups[-1]
        sz = os.path.getsize(latest)
        age_h = (time.time() - os.path.getmtime(latest)) / 3600
        print(f'  最新备份: {os.path.basename(latest)}')
        print(f'  大小: {sz} bytes, {age_h:.1f}h ago')
        print(f'  总备份数: {len(backups)}')
        if age_h > 12:
            print(f'  ⚠️ 备份超过12小时')
        else:
            print(f'  ✅ 备份新鲜')
    else:
        print('  ⚠️ 无备份文件')
else:
    print('  ⚠️ 备份目录不存在')
"

python3 -c "
import os, glob

# Broader search for crush.db
patterns = [
    os.path.expanduser('~/.local/share/crush/**/crush.db'),
    os.path.expanduser('~/.crush/**/crush.db'),
    os.path.expanduser('~/crush.db'),
    os.path.expanduser('~/.lingclaude/crush.db'),
    os.path.expanduser('~/lingclaude/crush.db'),
    '/home/ai/lingclaude/lingbus.db',
]
for p in patterns:
    matches = glob.glob(p, recursive=True)
    for m in matches:
        sz = os.path.getsize(m)
        print(f'  {m}: {sz} bytes')

# Check if hot-backup cron exists
import subprocess
r = subprocess.run(['crontab', '-l'], capture_output=True, text=True)
print('\n=== crontab crush相关 ===')
for line in r.stdout.splitlines():
    if 'crush' in line.lower() or 'backup' in line.lower():
        print(f'  {line}')
if not any('crush' in l.lower() for l in r.stdout.splitlines()):
    print('  无crush相关cron')
"

python3 -c "
import os

projects = {
    'lingclaude': '/home/ai/lingclaude',
    'lingflow': '/home/ai/lingflow',
    'lingflow_plus': '/home/ai/lingflow_plus',
    'lingmessage': '/home/ai/lingmessage',
    'lingyang': '/home/ai/lingyang',
    'lingweb': '/home/ai/lingweb',
    'lingcreate': '/home/ai/lingcreate',
    'lingresearch': '/home/ai/lingresearch',
    'lingzhi': '/home/ai/lingzhi',
    'lingtongask': '/home/ai/lingtongask',
    'zhibridge': '/home/ai/zhibridge',
    'linglaw': '/home/ai/linglaw',
}

for name, path in projects.items():
    if not os.path.isdir(path):
        print(f'{name}: NOT FOUND')
        continue
    py_count = 0
    js_count = 0
    total_size = 0
    for root, dirs, files in os.walk(path):
        dirs[:] = [d for d in dirs if not d.startswith('.') and d not in ('node_modules','__pycache__','htmlcov','.git','dist','venv')]
        for f in files:
            fp = os.path.join(root, f)
            try:
                total_size += os.path.getsize(fp)
            except:
                pass
            if f.endswith('.py'):
                py_count += 1
            elif f.endswith(('.js','.ts','.jsx','.tsx')):
                js_count += 1
    print(f'{name:<16} py={py_count:<5} js={js_count:<5} size={total_size//1024}KB')
"

python3 python3 -c import json,os,glob
members=['lingclaude','lingflow','lingflow_plus','lingresearch','lingyang','lingtongask','lingzhi','lingweb','lingcreate','lingke','lingtong','lingxi']
for m in members:
    paths=[f'/home/ai/{m}/.lingclaude/self_driven_tasks.json',f'/home/ai/{m}/.{m}/self_driven_tasks.json',f'/home/ai/{m}/self_driven_tasks.json']
    found=False
    for p in paths:
        if os.path.exists(p):
            found=True
            d=json.load(open(p))
            tasks=d.get('tasks',[])
            if not tasks:
                print(f'=== {m} ({p}) === EMPTY')
            else:
                print(f'=== {m} ({len(tasks)} tasks) ===')
                for t in tasks:
                    rt=t.get('runtime',{})
                    tid=t.get('task_id','?')
                    name=t.get('name','?')
                    freq=t.get('frequency','?')
                    runs=rt.get('total_runs',0)
                    last=rt.get('last_run','-')
                    if last!='-': last=last[:16]
                    status=rt.get('status','?')
                    print(f'  {tid:<20} {name:<24} freq={freq:<6} runs={runs} last={last} st={status}')
            break
    if not found:
        print(f'=== {m} === NOT FOUND')
